en.extract:
The little pied flycatcher (Ficedula westermanni) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia.
The species was given the binomial Muscicapula westermanni by R.B. Sharpe in 1888 based on a specimen collected by Leonard Ray in Malaysia and named after Gerardus Frederik Westerman.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.


References


External links

The '''little pied flycatcher''' ('''''Ficedula westermanni''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]]. It is native to the [[Himalayas]] and [[Southeast Asia]].

The species was given the binomial ''Muscicapula westermanni'' by R.B. Sharpe in 1888 based on a specimen collected by [[Leonard Ray]] in Malaysia and named after [[Gerardus Frederik Westerman]].<ref>{{cite book|page=594|title=The Eponym Dictionary of Birds|author1=Beolens, Bo|author2=Watkins, Michael|author3=Grayson, M.|year=2020| publisher=Bloomsbury Publishing}}</ref>

Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
[[File:Female of Little Pied Flycatcher.jpg|thumb|Female from Sattal India]]

<gallery>
File:Habitat shot of Little Pied Flycatcher (Ficedula westermanni) DSC 7488.jpg|Dulung Hide, Dulung Reserve Forest, [[Lakhimpur district|Lakhimpur]], [[Assam]]

zh.extract:
小斑姬鶲（学名：Ficedula westermanni）为鶲科姬鶲属的鸟类，分布于孟加拉国，不丹，柬埔寨，中国，印度，印度尼西亚，老挝，马来西亚，缅甸，尼泊尔，菲律宾，泰国，东帝汶和越南。


亚种
小斑姬鶲西南亚种（学名：Ficedula westermanni australorientis）。在中国大陆，分布于西藏、云南、贵州、广西等地。该物种的模式产地在老挝。
